name.description: The name of the Function App.

location.description: The Azure region to deploy to.

resourceGroupName.description: The name of the resource group.

runtime.description: The runtime stack (e.g. node, python, dotnet).

storageAccount.description: Override properties for the underlying Azure Storage Account resource.
